summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of HealthFit static web application. Main bug fix (login popup appearing everywhere) is working correctly. Most core features functional including signup, BMI calculator, meal planner, food search, and navigation.

ui_bugs.issue: Login form shows 'Invalid email or password' error even with correct credentials from signup

integration_issues.issue: User session not persisting between page reloads, causing authentication state loss

passed_tests: Landing page loads with all 4 feature cards (BMI Calculator, Live Nutrition Charts, Smart Meal Planning, PDF Health Reports)
Get Started and Login buttons functional
Signup flow works correctly - redirects to dashboard without login popup overlay
Dashboard shows welcome message and quick stats (BMI, BMR, Meals, Calories)
BMI calculator works correctly (calculated BMI: 24.2 for test data)
Navigation between all pages works (Dashboard, Meal Planner, History, Profile)
Diet toggle buttons are visible and clickable (All, Veg, Non-Veg, High Protein)
Food search works - found 24 results for 'dal' search with Indian foods prioritized
Popular Indian Foods section displays correctly with items like 'Dal Tadka'
Add food to meal slots works - can add foods to breakfast/lunch/dinner/snacks
Meal timeline shows added foods with calorie information
Profile page displays user information correctly
Logout works and returns to landing page
CRITICAL: No login/signup forms appearing on dashboard - main bug fix working
Charts show empty state correctly when no meals added
Food database contains 1500+ items with 70% Indian foods as specified
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix login authentication issue - users cannot login with valid credentials created during signup. The signup process works but subsequent login attempts fail with 'Invalid email or password' error. This prevents testing of charts with real data and full user session functionality.
